message:
feat(agentdb): Unified sql.js WASM + RuVector integration

- Add forceWasm config option to use sql.js WASM backend
- Pass vectorBackend to all controllers (ReflexionMemory, SkillLibrary)
- Add isWasm and vectorBackendName getters for backend info
- Fix database getter to use IDatabaseConnection type
- All 104 tests passing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
